prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "10. Directors, Executive Officers and Corporate Governance" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 11. Executive Compensation".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 10's text:
- If the "Item 11" heading is visible on this page, Item 10 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 10 runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 10 at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Our Corporate Governance and Nominating Committee will be independent under the applicable Nasdaq listing standards. Our board of directors has adopted
a written charter for the Corporate Governance and Nominating Committee, which is available on our corporate website at www.ccntech.com.
